object_a.label: rug
object_a.long_form_open_description: Low-pile carpet or runner on the landing in a beige/tan color similar to the walls but slightly darker; shows compression lines and seams where it meets the first stair tread. Appears continuous with the carpeted stairs.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Covers the floor between the left wall and the base of the stairs; directly under the lower newel post/banister
object_a.object_text_long: center sector | Low-pile carpet or runner on the landing in a beige/tan color similar to the walls but slightly darker; shows compression lines and seams where it meets the first stair tread. Appears continuous with the carpeted stairs.
object_a.text_input_for_clip_long: center sector | Low-pile carpet or runner on the landing in a beige/tan color similar to the walls but slightly darker; shows compression lines and seams where it meets the first stair tread. Appears continuous with the carpeted stairs.

object_b.label: plant
object_b.description: potted green houseplant on small table near front of sofa
object_b.long_form_open_description: A medium-sized leafy green houseplant (possibly a dracaena or similar) in a pot placed on a small dark table beside the sofa's front corner. Leaves are long and hanging; pot is dark and the plant appears healthy.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Sits on a small side table adjacent to the front left corner of the sofa, near the base of the staircase
object_b.object_text_short: potted green houseplant on small table near front of sofa
object_b.object_text_long: center sector | A medium-sized leafy green houseplant (possibly a dracaena or similar) in a pot placed on a small dark table beside the sofa's front corner. Leaves are long and hanging; pot is dark and the plant appears healthy.
